case_title: CHELSEA MUEHE VS. RUEL BORJA et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-13-2012 CONTINUED TO JAN-08-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE NOV-13-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BORJA, RUEL

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUEHE, CHELSEA AS TO DEFENDANT BORJA, RUEL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-26-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-25-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-11-2012
